name: known_bad_ip
description: Source IP matches a known-bad indicator in the threat intel feed

name: protocol_app_mismatch
description: Network protocol does not match the application or destination port

name: high_risk_port
description: Connection to a high-risk destination port (22, 23, 3389, 4444, 5900, 6667)

name: outbound_smtp
description: Internal host sending outbound traffic on port 25 to an external IP

name: denied_medium_port_offhours
description: Denied connection to a medium-risk port during off-hours

name: auth_failure
description: Authentication failure on an authentication, application, or web_server module

name: account_lockout
description: Account lockout event — direct signal of brute force activity

name: auth_failure_offhours
description: Authentication failure occurring during off-hours

name: high_log_severity
description: Event severity field is ERROR or CRITICAL (>= 6)

name: firewall_allow_high_risk
description: Firewall allowed traffic to an external high-risk port

name: cloud_offhours_external
description: Cloud action during off-hours from an external (non-RFC1918) IP

name: db_external_access
description: Database module event sourced from an external IP

name: sensitive_endpoint
description: Access to a sensitive HTTP endpoint (/admin, /.env, /api/internal etc.)

name: workstation_to_phi_db
description: Workstation (10.10.x.x) connecting directly to PHI database port, bypassing PAM

name: vendor_direct_phi
description: External or vendor IP connecting directly to PHI database without PAM session

name: bec_phishing
description: Business Email Compromise — lookalike domain targeting executive accounts

name: hsm_wrong_actor
description: HSM operation performed by an actor other than the approved service account

name: audit_integrity
description: Delete or write operation on immutable audit repository or Splunk indexer

name: c2_dns_beacon
description: C2 DNS beaconing pattern — queries to suspicious TLD at regular intervals

name: impossible_travel
description: Same account authenticated from two geographically impossible locations in short time

name: credential_stuffing
description: Credential stuffing — high API call count with many unique users on auth endpoints

name: bulk_phi_query
description: Bulk SELECT on PHI tables returning more than the row count threshold

name: pam_outside_window
description: PAM privileged account checkout outside the approved time window

name: privilege_escalation
description: Unauthorised privilege escalation — user added to privileged group by unknown actor

name: mass_smb_enum
description: Mass SMB share enumeration — ransomware staging or lateral movement signal

name: bulk_s3_phi_access
description: Bulk access to S3 PHI bucket — data staging or exfiltration signal

name: sql_injection
description: SQL injection pattern detected in message field

name: xss_pattern
description: Cross-site scripting pattern detected in message field

name: shell_injection
description: Shell injection pattern detected in message field

name: ransomware_pattern
description: Ransomware file extension or behaviour pattern detected in message field

name: jndi_injection
description: JNDI injection (Log4Shell) pattern detected in message field

name: sensitive_file_access
description: Sensitive file path detected in message field

name: scanner_agent
description: Known vulnerability scanner user-agent detected in message field

name: base64_payload
description: Long base64-encoded payload detected in message field — possible obfuscation
